step_rationale: Atheroprotective immune response counteracting pro-inflammatory IgG response to OxLDL.
mechanism: IgM autoantibodies to oxidized LDL exert atheroprotective effects by suppressing pro-inflammatory immune responses to atherogenic LDL oxidation.

references.title: Antibodies to oxidized low density lipoprotein: epidemiological studies and potential clinical applications in cardiovascular disease.
